reviews.review_description: This app is completely broken for me on my Quest Pro. It loads fine but the controls are completely unresponsive. I can see the laser pointer that's supposed to follow my hand stuck on my floor but it won't move at all. All buttons are unresponsive as well. Controllers work fine in the OS when I pull up the Quest menu and work fine in every other app. Shame, I think volumetric media is neat and was looking forward to checking this app out 🙃

developer_response.body: Thanks for flagging this! We're aware of the issue affecting Quest Pro controller input — it's caused by recent SDK changes from Meta that unexpectedly broke compatibility. A fix is already in the pipeline and should be included in the next update. Appreciate your patience — we’re looking forward to having you experience the app as intended soon.

reviews.review_description: Anyone tell me why I cant login to voluverse on Quest 2? It said Incorrect username or password. I still login it on Patreon

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out! Please email us at dev@volucap.de with the error message you're seeing and the account you're trying to log in with. We'll take a closer look and help you get back in as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_description:
When I use it it won’t allow me to log in
Can you help fix this

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out! Please email us at dev@volucap.de with the error message you're seeing and the account you're trying to log in with. We'll take a closer look and help you get back in as quickly as possible.

reviews.review_description: Great Job ! Those are the most realistic scenes I have seen so far on my headset. Please add more content and increase your default resolution for quest 3, I used games quest optimizer to change render resolution and it's even better.
Great selection of volumetric capture content. The quality is mind blowing
The assets look super realistic but with a slowass internet connection such as mine you need a bit of patience. :⁠,-)
Can't wait to see more creators building more content. Some experiences are very short, but it's free so I don't care ;)

developer_response.body: Thank you a lot for your positive feedback, we always appreciate it!
